title: Associate management consultant
change: Occupational standard and assessment plan revised
overviewOfRole: Provide organisational and strategic advice to public, private and not-for-profit organisations.

knowledges.detail: Main industry sectors, the types of organisations within these sectors, and how a management consultancy can support their needs.
Key drivers of organisational change including digital, sustainability and regulatory factors, planned or unplanned.
Delivery models, including hybrid, global, partnership and contracting models and how they may influence organisational operations and stakeholder engagement.
Purpose, scope and value of management consultancy services.
Methods to manage internal and external stakeholder relationships.
Ethical responsibilities in consultancy including confidentiality, data ethics, equity, diversity and inclusion, sustainability, corporate and social responsibility and responsible AI use.
Methods to interpret key financial statements, including Key financial ratios, KPIs and commercial concepts used to assess organisational performance.
The components of business cases, cost benefit analysis and return on investment.
The stages of a project lifecycle and the different project methodologies used.
Processes supporting the management of risks, issues, assumptions and dependencies.
Data concepts including data quality, data interpretation, structure, and reliability.
Research and data analysis techniques that support insight driven decision making.
Capabilities, limitations and risks of AI assisted work in consultancy.
Digital collaboration and productivity tools used in consulting.
Principles and methods of user centred solution design.

behaviours.detail: Promotes equity, diversity and inclusion within the team, the wider organisation and service users.
Acts in a professional and ethical manner.
Uses a growth mindset for learning and feedback and actively engages in continuing professional development (CPD) to develop skills.
Team-focused and works effectively with colleagues and others.

skills.detail: Produce written communications that are structured, concise and audience appropriate.
Deliver verbal presentations using appropriate tone, pacing and visual support to convey findings, insights or project outcomes.
Demonstrate inclusive and collaborative team work.
Use data analysis tools to diagnose issues.
Conduct qualitative and quantitative research, interpret data and summarise findings.
Formulate evidence-based recommendations aligned with stakeholder objectives.
Manage stakeholder engagement, identifying levels of influence and interest.
Build and maintain professional working relationships.
Adapt communication style to meet diverse stakeholder needs.
Contribute to the project lifecycle by defining tasks, timelines, dependencies, managing risk, action trackers and other project relevant document.
Use digital tools to collaborate and deliver tasks.
Use AI tools in line with organisational policies and procedures.

eQAProvider.contactAddress:
Ofqual
Earlsdon Park, 53-55 Butts Road, Coventry, CV1 3BH

involvedEmployers: BAE Systems, CMI, Davies Group, DSW, IBM UK Foundation Manager IBM UK Early Professional Programmes, RedQuadrant, RHG Consult
otherInvolvedStakeholders: CMI, DSW Learning, RHG Consult, Davies Group
englishAndMathsQualifications: <p>English and maths qualifications must be completed in line with the <a rel="noopener" href="https://www.gov.uk/guidance/apprenticeship-funding-rules" target="_blank">apprenticeship funding rules</a>.</p>
reviewDetails: this apprenticeship will be reviewed in accordance with our change request policy.
clusterDescription: Lead and manage a project (business/process improvement), business support services and/or run a practice using the full range of business systems, procedures and accounting practice. Includes the ability to set-up and develop a new business

professionalRecognition.partialFreeText: Based on the duties and knowledge, skills and behaviours required for full occupational competence as set out in the occupational standard, we confirm that an apprentice that successfully completes the apprenticeship would have attained the educational base to move forward towards Chartered status, once they can also demonstrate that they meet the experiential requirements.

duties.dutyDetail: Conduct organisational research and analysis to diagnose issues and identify opportunities for improvement.
Develop business cases and analyse costs and benefits to support organisational decision‑making.
Plan and coordinate project activities, managing timelines, risks and dependencies to support successful delivery.
Assess organisational performance by reviewing financial information, operational data and key performance measures.
Engage with stakeholders to gather insight, build relationships and ensure their needs and perspectives inform project outcomes.
Produce clear and structured written reports, briefings and documentation to present findings and recommendations.
Deliver presentations to clients or internal teams to communicate analysis, options and recommendations.
Facilitate workshops, meetings or discussions to gather information, test ideas and support collaborative decision‑making.
Support change initiatives by applying structured approaches to help organisations implement new processes or ways of working.
Apply ethical and inclusive practices when handling information, interacting with stakeholders and contributing to organisational solutions.
Use digital collaboration and productivity tools to coordinate project work and contribute to the delivery of consultancy outputs.
Use AI‑enabled tools, where appropriate, to support research, analysis and solution development in line with organisational policies.
Contribute to the design of solutions that are user‑centred, accessible and aligned with organisational needs.
Analyse organisational change drivers, such as digital transformation, sustainability or regulatory requirements, to inform recommendations.
Analyse how different delivery models and the scope of consultancy services influence project approaches.
